time_travel_snapshots.description: Exclude snapshot output directory from all backup/snapshot operations

backup_scripts_to_update: Any script using Copy-Item, robocopy, or shutil.copytree on data directory

instructions.powershell: Use -Exclude parameter or robocopy /XD to exclude directories
instructions.python: Use shutil.copytree with ignore parameter or manually exclude paths
instructions.validation: Always verify snapshot directory is excluded before running backup operations
